{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Justice
| aliases = Justice
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Path of the Chainkeeper]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, [[Soulfire|soulfire]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[shadow madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, Strings of Shadow technique}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|First Gatekeeper, [[Archlord]], First Gatekeeper of the Akura clan}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Sage of Twin Stars]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Akura clan]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|home}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Akura Justice Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura]] Justice is an [[Archlord]] and a high-ranking member of the [[Akura clan]], serving as its First [[Gatekeeper]]. An ancient figure characterized by a long white beard, he holds the responsibility of inspecting external goods brought into the presence of the head family to ensure they meet clan standards. In this capacity, he possesses the authority to recommend that individuals be imprisoned or replaced in official events, such as the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament, if they fail to meet these requirements. During his inspections, he utilizes specialized tools to evaluate a person's lifeline resilience and the capacity of their spiritual cores. As a powerful practitioner, Justice utilizes [[shadow madra]] and the [[Path of the Chainkeeper]] to execute various techniques, including the creation of [[Strings of Shadow]]. He has acted as a mentor to [[Akura Malice]] and serves as a representative for the clan's [[Monarch]] when interacting with other high-level entities like the [[Sages]]. Beyond his administrative and gatekeeping duties, he has participated in combat, defending portals and engaging in battles against significant threats. Despite his formidable status, he has also demonstrated moments of personal vulnerability and professional stress regarding the shifting currents of [[fate]].}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Akura Justice]] is a representative of the [[Akura clan]] and possesses the [[Goldsign]] from the [[Path of the Chainkeeper]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|As an [[Archlord]] and the First [[Gatekeeper]] of the [[Akura clan]], [[Akura]] Justice serves as a distant cousin to [[Akura Charity]]. During evaluations, Justice utilizes [[soulfire]] to manipulate [[aura]] and employs a specialized device to measure lifelines, where the color of the emitted light indicates an individual's age. To further assess candidates, Justice conducts tests regarding [[madra]] stability, recovery rate, and density. Additionally, a thorn-covered cap is used by Justice to evaluate spiritual perception.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Justice]] is the First [[Gatekeeper]] of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Justice]] is an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Justice]] uses a device to measure lifelines.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The color of the light from Justice's lifeline device indicates age.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Justice]] uses [[soulfire]] to manipulate [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Justice]] performs tests for [[madra]] density, recovery rate, and stability.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Justice]] uses a thorn-covered cap to assess spiritual perception.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Justice is an [[Archlord]] and a distant cousin of [[Akura Charity]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Justice is currently at home.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Justice was looking for the [[dream tablets]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Justice]] is an old man with a long beard who uses [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Justice]] defended the portal alone on the fortress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|As a member of the [[Akura clan]], Justice serves as a subordinate within the family hierarchy. This [[Sage of Twin Stars]] utilized the [[Strings of Shadow]] technique during their activities. Additionally, Justice was responsible for opening a hangar designed specifically to house cloud fortresses.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Justice]] used the [[Strings of Shadow]] technique.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Justice]] is a [[Sage of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Justice]] is a subordinate of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Justice is an [[Akura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Justice opened a hangar specifically for cloud fortresses.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Justice]] is an ancient figure who mentored [[Charity]] when she was a girl.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Justice]] wears black gloves.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Sage of Twin Stars, I am Akura Justice, and I greet you on behalf of the Monarch.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Akura clan]]
